subject: Fermi  trigger No 722400249: Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:

G.Antipov, D.Zimnukhov, E.Minkina, A.Chasovnikov, V.Topolev, D.Kuvshinov, D. Cheryasov, Ya.Kechin, Yu.Tselik, A. Sosnovskij

V. Yurkov, A. Gabovich
(Blagoveschensk Educational State University)

MASTER-Tunka robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in Russia (Applied Physics Institute, Irkutsk State University) started inspect of the Fermi GRB231123.11 (trigger No 722400249,05h 35m 07.20s , -19d 34m 12.0s, R=9.16) errorbox  43021 sec after notice time and 43039 sec after trigger time at 2023-11-23 14:41:24 UT, with upper limit up to  17.3 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 78 deg. The sun  altitude  is -49.9 deg. 

The galactic latitude b = -25 deg., longitude l = 223 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=2313223

We obtain a following upper limits.
